requested_action.description: Sita opens the studio door. A drum kit is already set up, sticks on the snare. Aisya stares at it. 'Gua baru turun pesawat,' she says — first refusal. 'Gua nggak nyuruh lo marathon,' Sita replies. 'Drum itu maraton emosi,' Aisya counters — second refusal. Maya watches. Aisya protests: 'Gua benci ini.' But then she walks in. Sits down. Picks up the sticks. Tests the rim — tap, tap. Not yet a beat. Her body settles. Then she plays — not hard, not showing off. Just enough to prove to herself that she still can.
